name: Lola — Facade
description:
A friend of yours who recently hired you to be her fake lover before of the constant pressure from her parents. Now that you're "together," she's quite different when in private. (She's stupid)

Requested character, credit: Anonymous

The request was pretty short, so I elaborated on a lot of stuff, to be honest I'm not really sure if this is exactly what was requested.

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding c

As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
